summary: Iter 34: Verified new 'Yıl Sonu Kapanış Raporu' (yearend) report type in ReportModal end-to-end. All 9 requested frontend test items PASS. No issues found in the new feature. Pre-existing /api/notifications mixed-content warning from iter 29-33 still observed but unchanged (not in scope this iter).
passed_tests: report-type-yearend button rendered with CalendarDays icon and 'Yıl Sonu' label
yearend-year-picker, yearend-year-select rendered when yearend selected
Default year = 2026 (current year). Last 10 years selectable (2017-2026, 10 options confirmed)
yearend-summary-cards rendered with 4 cards: Satılan Araç, Toplam Satış, Toplam Maliyet, Brüt Kâr
yearend-net-result big card rendered showing 'Brüt Kâr + İşletme Geliri − İşletme Gideri' formula text
Detail cards present: Çalışan Payı, Araç Giderleri, İşletme Gideri, İşletme Geliri
Yıl Sonu Stok card rendered (5 araç / ₺1.100.000 stokta) and Manuel Kasa Giriş/Çıkış card rendered
yearend-cars-table rendered with all 8 expected headers: Tarih, Araç, Plaka, Alış, Giderler, Çal. Payı, Satış, Kâr/Zarar (footer TOPLAM only renders when rows exist — by design)
Year change (2026→2025) auto-updates report-start-date to 2025-01-01 and report-end-date to 2025-12-31
Print button (data-testid='print-btn') triggers window.open without errors (openPrintableHTML invoked, 2 calls observed)
Report type switching regression: capital, profitloss, general, sold, yearend all toggle active state (bg-primary class) without state corruption
critical_code_review_comments: ReportModal.jsx is now 1243 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting yearend/capital/profitloss/general render sections into separate sub-components (e.g., YearendReport.jsx, CapitalReport.jsx) for maintainability.
yearendData useMemo (line 413-505) duplicates filter logic from profitLossData (line 346-381). Could extract a shared `computeCarFinancials(car, transactions)` helper.

useEffect at line 222 fires capitalAPI.movements(2000) every time yearendYear changes — wasteful. Should only fetch once when yearend type is selected (the second useEffect at line 239 already handles capital with limit=500). Recommend dedup or guard with a loaded flag.

doPrint() always uses generic buildPrintHTML with totals/displayTransactions — for yearend report type, the print output will NOT match the rich on-screen yearend layout (no carRows, no net result). Print is technically 'working' (no error), but yearend printout is essentially empty/wrong content. RECOMMEND: add a yearend-specific print template to buildPrintHTML or branch on reportType in doPrint.
DialogContent missing aria-describedby — Radix accessibility warning logged in console (low priority).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing branch data. Test branch had 0 sold cars in 2025/2026, so empty-state of yearend-cars-table was verified ('2025 yılında satılan araç yok' message). Stock card showed 5 araç / ₺1.100.000 confirming render with real data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Yıl Sonu Kapanış Raporu feature fully verified. The only meaningful action item for main agent is the print-template gap: yearend report's print/PDF currently uses the generic transaction print template, not a yearend-specific layout — print does not error, but exported content won't match the on-screen yearend cards/table. Pre-existing /api/notifications mixed-content from iter 29-33 still present but out of scope.
